# PetGadgetHub

> Direct, Wirecutter-style guides to pet technology for real pet owners. Independent editorial. Transparent Amazon affiliate disclosures on every page.

Primary public URL: https://petgadgethub.co.uk (also served from Vercel; set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to match production).

## What this site is

PetGadgetHub is a small, editorially independent affiliate review site focused on practical pet gadgets: water fountains, GPS trackers, smart cameras, automatic feeders, grooming tools, travel gear, enrichment toys, and everyday walk essentials. Every recommendation opens with who the product is for, then explains the problem it solves.

## Editorial approach

- We describe the problem before mentioning any product.
- We include an honest note on each product page where limitations matter.
- Prices are not displayed on product cards because they change. We link directly to Amazon for live pricing.
- All outbound product links are Amazon affiliate links (tags: petgadgethu06-20 for US/CA, petgadgethub9-21 for UK). This is disclosed in a sticky banner on every page.

## Guides

Long-form buying guides live at /guides/{slug}. Some guides include a "Matching quiz" link to a related /quiz/{slug} flow. Currently published:

- /guides/best-gps-dog-tracker-uk
- /guides/cat-water-fountain-buying-guide
- /guides/best-pet-camera-small-flat
- /guides/automatic-pet-feeder-buying-guide-uk
- /guides/best-dog-harness-pulling-uk
- /guides/pet-air-purifier-dander-uk

## Quizzes

Interactive "pet problem solver" quizzes live at /quiz/{slug}. Currently published:

- /quiz/cat-not-drinking
- /quiz/watch-pet-when-out
- /quiz/dog-pulls-on-lead
- /quiz/worried-dog-gets-lost
- /quiz/my-dog-is-bored-at-home
- /quiz/travelling-with-my-pet
- /quiz/my-pet-needs-feeding-sorted
- /quiz/pet-fur-everywhere

## Key pages

- /: Homepage with featured product grid, category browse, and a teaser of recent guides
- /products/{slug}: Individual product guide with ScoreBox (editorial score), problem, solution, honest note, and FAQs
- /guides: Listing of long-form guides; /guides/{slug} for each article
- /quiz: Pet problem solver quizzes — answer a few questions, get filtered product recommendations
- /categories: Category hub — one card per category (not a flat list of all products)
- /categories/{category}: Filtered picks for a single category (hydration, training, travel, etc.)
- /about: Editorial mission and affiliate disclosure details
- /privacy: Privacy policy (contact: petgadgethub@protonmail.com)
- /tools/rental-resume: Free UK pet rental resume generator (Renters Rights Act 2025)

## Contact

petgadgethub@protonmail.com
